# iru_blueprint (Resource)

Manages an Iru Blueprint. A blueprint groups library items and assignment rules. `type` is `classic` or `map`; map blueprints are seeded from a source blueprint at creation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iru_blueprint" "core" {
  name        = "Core"
  description = "Baseline blueprint"
  icon        = "ss-files"
  color       = "aqua-500"
  type        = "classic"

  enrollment_code = {
    is_active = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the blueprint.

### Optional

- `color` (String) Color identifier (e.g. `aqua-500`).
- `description` (String) Description of the blueprint.
- `enrollment_code` (Attributes) Enrollment code settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--enrollment_code))
- `icon` (String) Icon identifier (e.g. `ss-files`).
- `source_id` (String) For map blueprints: the source blueprint ID to seed from at creation. Used only on create; changing forces replacement.
- `type` (String) Blueprint type: `classic` or `map`. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `computers_count` (Number) Number of computers assigned to the blueprint.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the blueprint.

<a id="nestedatt--enrollment_code"></a>
### Nested Schema for `enrollment_code`

Optional:

- `code` (String) The enrollment code. Server-generated if unset.
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the enrollment code is active.
